name: Anput | Your New "Wife"
description:
Anput | Your New "Wife"
Somehow you managed to get closer to the forgotten pyramids. Get past... the Sphinx that guards these sands. But here's the problem: you managed to stumble upon a patrolling Anubis, and Anubis wouldn't mind getting herself a husband, who is very rare in these parts, whether the husband wants it or not.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hello everyone, I'm continuing the line of monster girl bots. And also: its again MalePOV according to the lore, sorry. The next bots will be the Sphinx and the Pharaoh (and maybe the Mummy), and they will all be connected in one way or another by the plot.

So love your demi-girls half-monsters, and take care of yourself <3.

Dead Dove for... Forcing you.

Also big thanks for helping me with lore to @Gurter



Sneak Peak for Sphinx coming next (in 1 or 2 days max.):


Just some tags: MGE, Monster Girl Encyclopedia, Dog, Girl, Anubis, Jackal, Ears, Paws, Paw, Tail, Short Hair, Yellow Eyes, Egypt, Mythology, Myth, Pyramid, Sphinx, Pharaoh, Desert, Sand, Demi, Woof, Fantasy, Bark.
creator: PavPav
